title: Belvala martiana
intro:
I couldn't find any information on the plant "Belvala martiana". It is possible that this plant is not well-known or may be a misspelling. If you are referring to "Valeriana martiana" or "Valerian", I can provide you with the following information:

Valerian is a perennial herb belonging to the Valerianaceae family, known for its sweet, pungent aroma and distinctive appearance. The health benefits of Valerian include promoting relaxation, reducing stress and anxiety, and improving sleep quality due to its sedative and calming properties. The bioactive constituents of Valerian include valerenic acid, isovaleric acid, and valepotriates, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. The most common herbal preparations made with Valerian include tea, capsules, tinctures, and essential oils, often used as a natural remedy for insomnia, restlessness, and other sleep-related disorders.
